columns.name: procedureId
columns.formula: =CONCATENATE( "PRO-", TEXT(TODAY(), "YYMMDD"), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1) )

columns.name: hetId
columns.formula: =CONCATENATE( "HET-", TEXT(TODAY(), "YYMMDD"), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1) )

columns.name: phaseId
columns.formula: =CONCATENATE( "PHS-", TEXT(TODAY(), "YYMMDD"), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1) )

columns.name: woId
columns.formula: =CONCATENATE( "WKO-", TEXT(TODAY(), "YYMMDD"), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1) )

columns.name: productionState
columns.formula: =IF([phaseOrderCurrent] = [phaseOrder], IF(AND(ISNOTBLANK([prodStart]),ISNOTBLANK([prodEnd])), IF([phaseOrder] < 16, "2. Next Phase"&IF(ISNOTBLANK([phaseId].[phaseShort]),": "& [nextPhase].[phaseShort],""), "4. Finished Goods"), IF(OR(ISBLANK([steralisationCurrent]),ISBLANK([steralisationCurrent].[result])), "1. In Progress"&IF(ISNOTBLANK([phaseId].[phaseShort]),": "&[phaseId].[phaseShort],""),"3. In Quarantine ("&TEXT([steralisationCurrent].[createdOn],"DD-MM-YY")&")") ), "5. WO Completed" )

columns.name: phaseOrderCurrent
columns.formula: =IF([combinedHetCheck], INDEX( SELECT(workOrder[phaseOrder], CONTAINS([batchHetIds], [_THISROW].[hetId])), COUNT(SELECT(workOrder[phaseOrder], CONTAINS([batchHetIds],[_THISROW].[hetId]))), ), INDEX( SELECT(workOrder[phaseOrder], [hetId] = [_THISROW].[hetId]), COUNT(SELECT(workOrder[phaseOrder], [hetId] = [_THISROW].[hetId])) ) )

columns.name: manuId
columns.formula: =CONCATENATE( "MAN-", TEXT(TODAY(), "YYMMDD"), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1) )

columns.name: manuNumber
columns.formula: =IF( ISBLANK([_THISROW].[manuNumber]), MID("ABCDEFGHIJKL", MONTH(TODAY()), 1) & RIGHT("00" & DAY(TODAY()), 2)&RIGHT("00"&[entryCountToday],3) & "025" & MID("ABCDEFGHIJ", NUMBER(LEFT(RIGHT(TEXT(YEAR(TODAY())), 2), 1)), 1) & MID("ABCDEFGHIJ", NUMBER(RIGHT(TEXT(YEAR(TODAY())), 1)), 1), [_THISROW].[manuNumber] )

columns.name: bomId
columns.formula: =CONCATENATE( "BOM-", TEXT(TODAY(), "YYMMDD"), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1) )

columns.name: bomLineId
columns.formula: =CONCATENATE( "BOL-", TEXT(TODAY(), "YYMMDD"), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1) )

columns.name: woSerialId
columns.formula: =CONCATENATE( "WOS-", TEXT(TODAY(), "YYMMDD"), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1) )

columns.name: sterId
columns.formula: =CONCATENATE( "STE-", TEXT(TODAY(), "YYMMDD"), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1), MID([keyText], RANDBETWEEN(1, LEN([keyText])), 1) )

columns.name: quantity
columns.formula: =IF( [woId].[phaseOrder] = 13, IF( [direction] = "OUT", [woId].[previousWo].[outPut], INDEX( SELECT(sterilise[quantity], AND( [woId] = [_THISROW].[woId], [direction] = "OUT" ) ), 1 ) ), IF( [direction] = "OUT", 0, [woId].[previousWo].[outPut] - INDEX( SELECT(sterilise[quantity], AND( [woId] = [_THISROW].[woId], [direction] = "OUT" ) ), 1 ) ) )
